items.prompt: StandardScaler is motivated in Example 5.46 because:
choices: Distance models overweight large-magnitude features without scaling
Tree models require zero mean always
items.explain: Income magnitude can dominate age in kNN without scaling.
Examples 5.47 and 5.50 use one-hot for unordered categories.

choices: Leakage if statistics use the full dataset before splitting
items.explain: Example 5.49 must be computed inside folds to avoid leakage.

items.prompt: Label encoding is appropriate for ordinal size levels when order matters.
items.explain: Example 5.48 uses label encoding for ordered categories.
